productName: Heavnely Buds Infused Bubble Hash Little Snappers - Double Strawberry - 2pk (2x0.5g)
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Double Strawberry supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a sweet, juicy strawberry flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
